NEW DELHI: The IPL 2026 Orange Cap race has taken a dramatic turn, with Abhishek Sharma storming to the top after a sensational unbeaten 135 against Delhi Capitals, a knock that underlined both his form and dominance this season. The Sunrisers Hyderabad opener now leads the charts with 323 runs, averaging 53.83 at a staggering strike rate of 215.33, setting the benchmark for the competition.Close on his heels is teammate Heinrich Klaasen , who has been equally impactful with 320 runs. Klaasen’s consistency and finishing ability have made him a vital pillar in SRH’s batting line-up, keeping the pressure firmly on Abhishek at the summit.Gujarat Titans skipper Shubman Gill occupies third place with 265 runs from just five matches, combining leadership with reliability. Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s Virat Kohli follows in fourth with 247 runs, continuing his steady run of form, while Rajasthan Royals young sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi completes the top five with 246 runs in an impressive breakout season.Further down the list, SRH’s stand-in captain Ishan Kishan has climbed to sixth with 238 runs, edging past RCB skipper Rajat Patidar, who sits seventh with 230. Punjab Kings’ Cooper Connolly and Rajasthan Royals’ Yashasvi Jaiswal are tied on 223 runs, occupying eighth and ninth respectively, while PBKS batter Priyansh Arya rounds off the top 10 with 211 runs.With margins so tight and multiple players in peak form, the Orange Cap race is shaping up to be one of the most compelling storylines of IPL 2026. Each innings is proving decisive, with positions shifting rapidly as batters push the limits.In a match that briefly influenced these standings on Tuesday, Abhishek’s blistering 135 powered Sunrisers Hyderabad to a 47-run win over Delhi Capitals, reinforcing his grip on the coveted cap.
Article Summary: Abhishek sharma leads the ipl 2026 orange cap race after a sensational unbeaten 135 against delhi capitals. The sunrisers hyderabad opener now leads the charts with 323 runs, averaging 53.83 at a staggering strike rate of 215.33.close on his heels is teammate heinrich klaasen, who has been equally impactful with 320 runs.

Article Title: “Not the personality for all-time greats”: Luka Doncic gets ‘lazy’ NBA player tag amid absence from Lakers’ roster
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Harry How/ Getty Images

Luka Doncic faces harsh criticism from Eddie Johnson after being dismissed from the MVP race



Luka Doncic. Image via: Alonzo Adams-Imagn Images

What does Eddie Johnson's criticism mean for Luka Doncic?



Luka Doncic. Image via: Mark J. Rebilas-Imagn Images

Luka Doncic faces harsh criticism at a time when his talent remains unquestioned, but his standing in the MVP race has slipped again. The Los Angeles Lakers star is putting up elite numbers, yet he finds himself outside the final shortlist. That gap between production and recognition has opened the door for sharper scrutiny, and this time it came from former NBA guard Eddie Johnson.Injuries have disrupted Doncic’s rhythm, and his absence from key stretches has only added to the noise. While peers like Nikola Jokic and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander continue to build complete seasons, Doncic’s campaign has been uneven. The numbers still shine, but the conversation around him has shifted, focusing less on brilliance and more on what might be missing.Eddie Johnson’s assessment cuts deeper than a typical critique. He praised Doncic’s skill, calling him nearly impossible to defend, but quickly turned to what he sees as a pattern holding the guard back.“Luka Doncic is the most unguardable player in the NBA. The NBA has been waiting for him to ascend to his rightful place as an MVP and champion. Both scenarios have been hard to come by and all Luka needs to do is look in the mirror.In my opinion, he runs a 24-mile marathon instead of 26.2 miles.”That metaphor set the tone. Johnson believes Doncic falls short in the final stretch, not because of talent, but because of habits.“Luka is so talented that he believes in shortcuts on the floor. That is not the personality for all-time greats. Gaining weight in-season, taking off defensive plays, arguing with officials and taking bad shots because you are tired. They all add up to failure and are the difference in winning what he needs, and that’s an MVP and a championship.”It is a harsh take, especially for a player who has already led a team to the NBA Finals and continues to post near triple-double averages. Yet the frustration behind it reflects a wider sentiment. Doncic has flirted with MVP contention before but has never fully seized it.The criticism lands at a crossroads in Doncic’s career. He is still one of the league’s most gifted scorers and playmakers, but expectations have evolved. Being great is no longer enough.There are signs of progress. Doncic entered the season in better shape and showed more effort on defense before injury slowed him down. His chemistry with LeBron James and Austin Reaves also hinted at a stronger structure in Los Angeles. Those improvements matter, even if they do not silence every critic.Still, Johnson’s words highlight a simple truth. The margin at the top of the NBA is thin. A few missed defensive rotations, a moment spent arguing instead of getting back, or a tired shot selection can tilt the balance. For Doncic, closing that gap could be the difference between being remembered as a great talent and becoming a complete winner.
Article Summary: Lakers guard eddie johnson criticises luka doncic for not winning mvp. Johnson says the slovenian needs to stop taking shortcuts on the floor. The criticism lands at a crossroads in doncic’s career. Being great is no longer enough.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes splurge $60,000 on a massive gift for their children as his recovery timeline sparks concern
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes splurge $60,000 on a massive gift for their children as his recovery timeline sparks concern.(Image via Getty Images)

Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes make an expensive purchase for their family



When is Patrick Mahomes returning to the field amid his brutal injuries?



Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, has been spending time recovering from his brutal injuries as he also enjoys the offseason being with his wife, Brittany Mahomes, and their three young children.Throughout the last few months, the Mahomes’ family has been pretty busy celebrating milestones and birthdays and it seems, Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes recently made a lavish purchase for their three children.A few hours ago, Patrick Mahomes’ wife, Brittany Mahomes, took to her social media to make a post about a massive custom built playhouse which the two bought for their backyard for their three young children.As per reports, the sprawling playhouse cost Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes a whopping $60,000.Patrick Mahomes’ wife, Brittany Mahomes, posted several pictures of their young children enjoying themselves in the playhouse, which fans have dubbed as a “mansion”.While the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Patrick Mahomes, is spending time playing with his children, all eyes are on whether he is ready to bounce back on the field in the next few months.A couple of weeks ago, the Kansas City Chiefs’ head coach, Andy Reid, opened up on Patrick Mahomes’ recovery at the NFL's annual league meetings as he said, "Every player is different. I will tell you though, I would never bet against him…”The popular coach continued, “He's going to put in the time and effort and always push it but within reason, so he doesn't take steps back.”Andy Reid added, "So far, it's all been positive. He's doing great."Over the last few months, there have been many speculations that Patrick Mahomes will be able to make a comeback in the first week of the new season.Back in January, the Kansas City Chiefs’ billionaire owner, Clark Hunt, had also commented on Patrick Mahomes’ recovery from ACL and LCL tears as he seemed assured that he will be able to make a return without missing any matches in the upcoming season.However, nothing has been confirmed yet as the team and the star player, Patrick Mahomes, remain silent on his potential return to the field after a poor run on the field in the last season.
Article Summary: Patrick mahomes and brittany mahomes splurge $60,000 on a massive gift for their children as his recovery timeline sparks concern. Patrick mahomes, the kansas city chiefs’ star player, has been spending time recovering from his brutal injuries.

Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: ‘The next 'demigod' of cricket’: Srikkanth invokes Tendulkar comparison for 'prodigy' Sooryavanshi
Article Text:
Sachin Tendulkar and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi

Watch Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation

‘No need to wait, he’s a match-winner’

Tendulkar comparison raises stakes

NEW DELHI: The buzz around Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has reached a fever pitch in IPL 2026, with former India captain Kris Srikkanth making a dramatic call to fast-track the 15-year-old sensation into the national setup — while even rival skipper Shreyas Iyer has labelled him “one for the future.”Srikkanth, known for his blunt takes, did not hold back as he urged selectors to act immediately. “This guy, Sooryavanshi… imagine someone playing such shots. That boy is simply outstanding and brilliant. Ajit, I’m telling you, you need to fast-track him. The next series, he should be playing,” he told The Week, addressing chief selector Ajit Agarkar The former chief selector dismissed the idea of a gradual approach, insisting the youngster is ready for the big stage. “I think Sooryavanshi should be fast-tracked. No question of ‘give him time, let him be consistent’. No chance. That guy can win matches for you just like that,” Srikkanth said.He pointed to the fearless manner in which the teenager has taken on elite bowlers this season — smashing Jasprit Bumrah for sixes and hammering Josh Hazlewood without hesitation. “Imagine, first ball, he hits Bumrah for a six… he’s not bothered about who the bowler is. He’s a prodigy,” he added.In a striking comparison, Srikkanth invoked Sachin Tendulkar ’s early rise. “When I went as captain in 1989, there was a prodigy — a 16-year-old Sachin Tendulkar. Today, he’s the God of Cricket. Similarly, this boy could well become the next ‘demigod’ of cricket,” he said.The excitement is not limited to former players. Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer also praised the youngster’s technique and temperament. “He is a spectacular talent… the way he has that bat flow, the rhythm and momentum… I think he is one for the future,” Iyer noted.Sooryavanshi has backed the hype with numbers, scoring 246 runs in six matches at a staggering strike rate of 236.53 this season.For now, all eyes remain on the prodigy as Rajasthan Royals face Lucknow Super Giants on Wednesday, with the teenager at the centre of Indian cricket’s next big debate.
Article Summary: Former india captain kris srikkanth has called on selectors to fast-track the 15-year-old sensation into the national setup. Punjab kings skipper shreyas iyer has labelled him “one for the future’ the teenager has scored 246 runs in six matches at a staggering strike rate of 236.53 this season.

Article Title: Blake Lively: "Messy as hell": Fans erupt as Blake Lively backs Justin Bieber while Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding rumors heat up
Article Text:
Tired of too many ads? go ad free now

Blake Lively defends Justin Bieber as Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding buzz fuels fan backlash

Tired of too many ads? go ad free now

After Blake Lively came out in support of Justin Bieber , people quickly changed the subject online. What started as a defense of an artist who was being criticized quickly turned into a bigger discussion about celebrity relationships, timing, and purpose. As always, social media wasted no time picking apart every angle.The time has only made the talk louder. With Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce continuing to dominate headlines with wedding buzz, fans are reading deeper into celebrity dynamics. Lively’s long-standing friendship with Swift has now been pulled into the conversation, turning a simple statement into a layered pop culture moment.A viral post captured the tone of the backlash, reflecting how quickly opinions formed online:“Ever the opportunist, Blake Lively jumps on the Justin Bieber Coachella high and tries to associate her name with his. It’s an interesting strategy, considering her (past?) ties to Taylor Swift, who has always hated him. Blake is messy as hell.”The criticism followed Lively’s defense of Bieber after his Coachella performance drew scrutiny. In her statement, she focused on the pressures artists face, writing, “The collective, often without realizing it, ends up destroying an artist's health, because everyone feels they have a right over him just for being in the spotlight...”Some fans understood that message as a call for empathy. Others, though, questioned the timing and purpose, especially since Swift is said to have had a history with Bieber. Even though those tensions have never been fully proven, they still affect the stories fans tell.The attention on Swift and Kelce has also caused a different kind of buzz. Rumors and reports about their wedding plans have kept them in the news and in the public eye. Every move they make now gets more attention, and Lively's comments were no exception.One thing that stands out is how quickly one statement can turn into a bigger story. In the digital world we live in today, context is everything, but it is often based on how people see things instead of what is true. Lively's words were meant to protect an artist. Instead, they started a bigger conversation about loyalty, timing, and the complicated web of relationships between celebrities.As of now, neither Swift nor Kelce has said anything. And maybe that silence speaks just as loudly as any headline.Stay updated with the latest IPL Live Score IPL news on Times of India . Follow the IPL Schedule, check the IPL Points Table , and track the race for the IPL Orange Cap and IPL Purple Cap
Article Summary: Blake lively came out in support of justin bieber after his coachella performance. Her comments quickly turned into a bigger discussion about celebrity relationships. Taylor swift and travis kelce continue to dominate headlines with wedding buzz. Lively's long-standing friendship with swift has now been pulled into the conversation.

Article Title: Carter Jensen: Who is Carter Jensen? Royals' young catcher making headlines with MLB debut, strong stats and a recent learning moment
Article Text:
Who is Carter Jensen? Royals' young catcher making headlines with MLB debut, strong stats and a recent learning moment (Image Via Getty Images)

Carter Jensen 's early life and baseball beginnings

Carter Jensen's journey through the minor leagues



Carter Jensen's MLB debut and performance so far

The recent incident and what it ment for Carter Jensen's growth

Young players often bring fresh energy to baseball, and Carter Jensen is doing just that. The 22-year-old catcher is slowly building his place in Major League Baseball. From high school talent to making his MLB debut in 2025, his journey shows steady growth. Fans are now watching closely as he continues to learn and improve with the Kansas City Royals.Carter Jensen was born on July 3, 2003, in Kansas City. He studied at Park Hill High School, where he played baseball and showed strong batting skills. 2021 marked his last school year when he reached a .387 hitting average which attracted the interest of multiple scouts.His baseball career took a new direction after the MLB Draft because he chose to leave his college baseball commitments at Louisiana State University.The Kansas City Royals selected Jensen during the third round of the 2021 MLB Draft. He started his professional career with the Arizona Complex League and demonstrated exceptional skills during his first matches. The Columbia Fireflies became his team in 2022 and he achieved All-Star status after hitting 11 home runs. The next two years, he played for various minor league teams including Quad Cities and Northwest Arkansas.He achieved an impressive season in 2025, recording a batting average of .288, hitting 28 home runs and driving in 90 runs. His performance helped him earn a spot in the All-Star Futures Game, which highlights top young players.On September 2nd, 2025, Jensen debuted in MLB at Kauffman Stadium versus the Los Angeles Angels. He recorded his first hit a couple of days later, against the Minnesota Twins.One of his best first year games was against the Seattle Mariners when he hit two home runs. He finished his first year in MLB with a .300 average in limited number of at-bats.Through April of 2026, Jensen's overall stats are a .263 average, 7 HR and 23 RBIs. He now serves as a backup catcher to Salvador Perez.In early 2026, Jensen faced a small setback. Before a home game against the Minnesota Twins, he missed pre-game preparations after oversleeping. Because of this, he was removed from the starting lineup.Later, he joined the game. After the match, he openly apologized to his teammates and the media. The present moment demonstrates that all athletes need to learn from their errors, yet must learn to accept responsibility for their actions. The new players of MLB need to experience these incidents because they form essential learning moments.
Article Summary: Carter jensen was born on july 3, 2003, in kansas city. He studied at park hill high school, where he played baseball and showed strong batting skills. The kansas city royals selected jensen during the third round of the 2021 mlb draft. He started his professional career with the arizona complex league and demonstrated exceptional skills.

Article Title: Coco Gauff and Elena Rybakina practice twist grabs attention as Iga Swiatek joins Naomi Osaka before Madrid Open
Article Text:
Coco Gauff, Elena Rybakina, Iga Swiatek and Naomi Osaka (Image Via Getty)



Coco Gauff, Elena Rybakina, Iga Swiatek, and Naomi Osaka sharpen form ahead of Madrid Open matches

The courts in Madrid are already busy, even before the real matches begin. Big names like Coco Gauff, Elena Rybakina, Iga Swiatek, and Naomi Osaka have started their practice sessions as the Madrid Open main draw kicks off this week. Fans who came early got a close look at some strong pairings on the practice courts.Gauff was seen training with Rybakina, while Swiatek worked with Osaka. These sessions were not just light hits. Players were fully focused, working on details, fixing small mistakes, and getting ready for the long tournament ahead. Videos from the venue and social media clips showed the energy building up as the tournament officially begins.Gauff and Rybakina shared the court in a high-intensity session. Gauff spent time working on her volleys, listening closely to her coach and making quick adjustments. On the other side, Rybakina kept hitting powerful shots and even paused at times to talk through her technique after certain rallies. The crowd around the practice court stayed engaged throughout.At another court, Swiatek and Osaka trained together. One moment caught attention online — Swiatek arrived a bit late for the session, but quickly got into rhythm once practice started.The two former world No. 1 players looked sharp and focused.All four players will begin their campaigns in the Round of 64 on Thursday, with opponents still to be confirmed. Swiatek, who won Madrid in 2024, could face Aryna Sabalenka later in the tournament if both progress deep. Rybakina may open against either Elena-Gabriela Ruse or Antonia Ruzic and could meet Zheng Qinwen in the third round. Gauff, seeded third, might face Oksana Selekhmeteva or a qualifier, with a possible clash against Jessica Pegula in the later rounds.For Gauff, this tournament carries extra importance. She is still searching for her first singles title of the 2026 season. Her year has had good moments, like reaching the Australian Open quarter-final, but also tough losses. She was beaten by Elina Svitolina more than once, including in Dubai. She also suffered an early exit in Qatar against Elisabetta Cocciaretto.Things looked better in Miami, where she reached the final. But once again, Sabalenka proved too strong in the final match. Gauff also had a setback at Indian Wells, where she had to withdraw due to injury during her match against Alexandra Eala.Now on clay, she is hoping Madrid can change her season. Her first match in Stuttgart ended in a loss to Karolína Muchová, so she will want a better start here. The preparation looks serious, and the intent is clear.
Article Summary: Coco gauff, elena rybakina, iga swiatek, and naomi osaka have started their practice sessions for the madrid open. All four players will begin their campaigns in the round of 64 on thursday, with opponents still to be confirmed. Gauff is still searching for her first singles title of the 2026 season.

So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Article Title: Nicky Butt calls Alejandro Garnacho attitude disgrace as Chelsea struggles grow and Liam Rosenior responds to transfer rumours
Article Text:
Nicky Butt and Alejandro Garnacho (Image Via Getty)

The Good, The Bad & The Football



Nicky Butt criticises Alejandro Garnacho attitude while Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior responds to transfer rumours

Things are getting tense around Alejandro Garnacho, and this time the criticism is coming from someone who knows him well. Former Manchester United academy head Nicky Butt has openly spoken about the winger’s attitude, and his words are strong. Speaking onpodcast with Paul Scholes, Butt said the club made the right decision by letting Garnacho go.At the same time, Garnacho’s current situation at Chelsea FC is not looking smooth either. The young winger joined the club last summer with big expectations, but his performances have not matched the hype so far. With just one goal in 22 Premier League games, questions are starting to come up about his role and future.Butt did not hold back while talking about Garnacho. He made it clear that the issue was not just about performance, but about behavior inside and outside the club.He said, “Someone in that club or team at the time should have been swatting him down, but the best thing Man United did was sell him because, forget his ability, and I don’t think he is that great anyway, but I thought his attitude was a disgrace when he was at Man United.”He also added, “More importantly when he left, and if you completely disrespect your teammates and the football club when you leave, then that’s it.”Butt then spoke about Garnacho’s mindset, saying, “He was 21 or whatever when he left the club but you can’t be up your own backside thinking you are as big or bigger than Man United.”Referring to a recent interview, Butt continued, “I thought I should have played every game. I was thinking number one, you weren’t even that good, and number two you are young, be humble.”These comments have quickly spread across football discussions, especially because Butt worked closely with Garnacho during his early days at Manchester United.Now, attention has shifted to what happens next at Chelsea. Reports have linked Garnacho with another move, even though he only joined recently for around £40 million. However, Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior has tried to calm things down.Speaking to reporters, as reported by GOAL, Rosenior said, “I’d like to know the source of the report. These reports can come from anywhere. Garna is 21 years old. Garna is someone who has special qualities when he is in a good place and he’s in good form. And my job is to help him reach those levels.”Right now, Chelsea are also struggling as a team. They have lost six of their last seven matches and failed to score in five of those games. As they prepare to face Brighton & Hove Albion, the focus will be on whether players like Garnacho can step up and change the mood.
Article Summary: Former manchester united academy head nicky butt criticises alejandro garnacho's attitude. Garnacho has scored just one goal in 22 premier league games for chelsea. Reports have linked garnacho with another move, even though he only joined recently for around £40 million.

Article Title: Ipl 2026: IPL 2026: Will DC make changes to XI after defeat to SRH? Skipper Axar Patel clarifies
Article Text:
SRH vs DC

Watch Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation

NEW DELHI: Sunrisers Hyderabad’s dominant win over Delhi Capitals was once again defined by Abhishek Sharma ’s explosive batting and a disciplined bowling effort led by Eshan Malinga. However, DC skipper Axar Patel remained calm after the defeat, suggesting no immediate panic or changes to the XI despite the heavy loss.Speaking after the match, Axar backed his squad and stressed that the team’s overall process was still on track. He said, "No, right now it doesn’t feel like that, because the kind of cricket that is going on - if you see, obviously we are batting well and bowling well. It feels like, I think you know, when the wicket is so good, then this should be considered an off day and forgotten."He also acknowledged missed opportunities in the field that hurt DC’s chances against Abhishek’s onslaught. "The run-out and the catch we missed - had we taken it, we could have restricted them," he said, while still giving full credit to SRH’s batting firepower.Axar further added that even good execution sometimes fails against extraordinary batting. "If someone bats that well, and their execution is not lacking, credit must be given for such a performance... when a batsman bats like this, the coach and the captain must accept that even a captain cannot stop someone," he explained.He also emphasised the importance of support within the team environment during tough games, particularly for bowlers under pressure.The match itself saw Abhishek Sharma produce a breathtaking unbeaten 135 off 68 balls, powering SRH to a massive 242/2. Despite a brief fightback from Delhi’s middle order, Malinga’s 4/32 broke the chase apart as DC were restricted to 195/9.Abhishek’s knock, supported by Travis Head and Heinrich Klaasen, ensured SRH’s dominance from the start, while Axar admitted that sometimes, opponents simply outplay you on the day.
Article Summary: Sunrisers hyderabad beat delhi capitals by eight wickets. Abhishek sharma top scored for srh with 135 off 68 balls. Eshan malinga took 4/32 as dc were restricted to 195/9. Dc captain axar patel remained calm after the defeat.

Article Title: Tiger Woods son Charlie Woods struggles continue with T42 at Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 as Justin Thomas steps in with support
Article Text:
Charlie Woods (Image Via Getty)

Charlie Woods struggles continue despite late recovery at Terra Cotta Invitational as Justin Thomas offers support

Watch Tiger Woods DUI Bodycam Footage Caught SOS Call To Trump; Shocking Crash & Pills Reveal Chaos Tiger Woods DUI Bodycam Footage Caught SOS Call To Trump; Shocking Crash & Pills Reveal Chaos

The latest outing for Charlie Woods once again showed a mix of hope and struggle. Playing at the Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 at Naples National Golf Club, he finished tied 42nd in a field of 72 players. His total score of 3 over par came from rounds of 79, 71, and 69. On paper, it looks like progress. But when you follow the round closely, it tells a more uneven story.What stands out is how his performance changed day by day. The first round put him on the back foot early, and from there, he kept trying to recover. While the last two rounds showed better control, the slow start cost him a strong finish. This pattern is becoming familiar in his recent tournaments, where a few good moments are not enough to balance the mistakes.The opening round made things tough right away. Starting from the back nine, Tiger's son Charlie Woods dropped three straight bogeys from holes 16 to 18. That early pressure stayed with him. He added more bogeys on holes 2, 5, 6, and 8. There were birdies on 4 and 9, but they could not fully fix the damage. By the end of day one, he was near the bottom of the leaderboard.Then came a better second round. He shot 1 under 71, mixing four bogeys with five birdies.That round helped him move up from 70th to 57th. It showed he could reset and fight back. The final round was even better. After a bogey on the first hole, he settled down and picked up birdies on 6, 7, 9, and 18. That pushed him up 15 spots to finish T42.Still, this is not just about one event. His 2026 season has been difficult overall. At the Junior Invitational, he finished last with rounds of 75, 76, 83, and 80. At the AJGA Simplify Boys Championship, he placed 68th. He did slightly better at the Junior Orange Bowl, finishing 19th, but consistency is still missing.Even with these results, there is support around him. Justin Thomas spoke about him on the Smylie Show. He said, “I wanna be if he wants me to be. I wanna help in any way I can. The shots that he can hit, a lot of guys on Tour can’t hit. He’s very, very impressive and I’m rooting for the best.” Justin Thomas shares a close bond with Tiger Woods, which makes his support feel more personal.Right now, Tiger's son Charlie Woods is still finding his rhythm. The talent is visible, but the results are not steady yet. Until he can put together full rounds without mistakes, these mixed finishes are likely to continue.
Article Summary: Charlie woods finished tied 42nd in terra cotta invitational 2026 at naples national golf club. His total score of 3 over par came from rounds of 79, 71, and 69. The first round put him on the back foot early, and from there, he kept trying to recover.

Article Title: Connor Mcdavid: Connor McDavid’s wife Lauren Kyle celebrates emotional milestone as Oilers captain gears up for electrifying Stanley Cup playoff run
Article Text:
Connor McDavid’s wife (Getty Images)

Connor McDavid’s wife reacts to milestone ahead of Oilers’ high-stakes playoff campaign

Poll What will be the biggest factor for the Oilers in their playoff matchups? Player health and fitness Coaching strategies Overall team morale

The Edmonton Oilers closed their regular season with purpose, delivering a 6-1 win over the Vancouver Canucks that did more than pad the standings. It set a tone. At the center of it, Connor McDavid dictated play with four assists, wrapping up another elite campaign. The result secured second place in the Pacific Division and home-ice advantage for the opening round. Off the ice, the moment carried a personal note as Lauren Kyle shared her pride publicly.Connor McDavid’s final outing wasn’t just productive. It felt controlled, almost routine for a player operating at this level. His four assists helped power an early surge, including a standout opening period where Matt Savoie recorded his first NHL hat trick. The Oilers never looked back from there.After the game, McDavid didn’t overstate it, but he made it clear the win mattered beyond the scoreboard. “It was an important one. We wanted to start here at home and give ourselves the best chance in the first round. The start was great,” he said.That clarity extended to his line’s development. There has been a noticeable shift in chemistry, especially with Savoie and Zach Hyman alongside him. “(Me and Savoie are) building something a little bit, playing together for a little while now.We’re starting to understand each other a little bit. (Zach Hyman) came in and did exactly what he does, forechecks hard and fills that net-front spot, which frees up a lot of space for us. ”Numbers back up the impact. McDavid secured the Art Ross Trophy with 138 points, his sixth time leading the league. That places him alongside Mario Lemieux and Gordie Howe, trailing only Wayne Gretzky in all-time scoring titles. It’s rare company, and it adds weight to what already feels like a defining stretch in his career.Away from the numbers, Lauren Kyle’s posts from Rogers Place gave a glimpse into the moment. A shot of the scoreboard came with a simple line, “Off to the playoffs!!” Another message, just as direct, read, “So proud of you.” It wasn’t elaborate, but it didn’t need to be. The context spoke for itself.Edmonton’s wider performance also offered encouragement. Ryan Nugent-Hopkins contributed offensively, while Colton Dach added a Gordie Howe hat trick. Cleaner puck movement and sharper finishing stood out, areas that had wavered at times earlier in the schedule.The focus now shifts quickly. A first-round matchup with the Anaheim Ducks begins April 20. McDavid’s form is a given at this point. The question is whether the rhythm building around him holds under playoff pressure.
Article Summary: Edmonton oilers beat vancouver canucks 6-1 to clinch second place in the pacific division. Connor mcdavid had four assists in the win, his sixth art ross trophy. His wife, lauren kyle, posted a message from rogers place. The oilers face the anaheim ducks in the first round.

Article Title: Aryna Sabalenka fiancé Georgios Frangulis addresses critics questioning his presence during her tennis matches
Article Text:
Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis (Image Via Getty)

Money Buys Happiness podcast



Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis relationship and response to criticism explained

Esquire

There has been a lot of talk around Aryna Sabalenka and her fiancé Georgios Frangulis. Many fans have noticed him sitting in the stands during her matches, and not everyone has been supportive. Some people even questioned how he manages his business while attending so many games. Now, Georgios has finally responded, and his message was very direct.In a video shared by theon Instagram, Georgios made it clear that he is not bothered by the criticism. He spoke openly about his relationship and how they support each other. At the same time, he also pushed back at people who keep judging his choices and his presence during Sabalenka’s matches.Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis started dating in 2024, and earlier this year, they announced their engagement. Since then, Georgios has often been seen in her player box during big matches. While many fans enjoy seeing that support, others have raised questions about his work and time.Georgios Frangulis addressed this directly in his statement. He said, “For me to have someone that I love that trusts me and looks up to me.I can teach and learn from, with my fiancé. With Aryna it’s all upside. I don’t see any downside.”He then spoke about the criticism he receives and how he handles his work. He explained that watching matches does not stop him from managing his responsibilities. He said, “Believe me I get criticism. How can he run the company. He’s always watching tennis. You see me on TV and I am watching tennis. It’s a two-hour match. Like I was doing a meeting before I’m gonna do another after. Not your business what I am doing.”Georgios Frangulis also praised Aryna Sabalenka’s success and their shared understanding. He added, “She’s super accomplished. We can enjoy each other’s success, help each other’s failures.”On the other side, Sabalenka has also spoken about how important this relationship is for her. In an interview with, she shared a simple lesson she has learned. She said, “You see that each area of life takes the same dedication, discipline, and hard work.”While all this is happening off the court, Sabalenka’s form on the court has been strong. She started the season by winning the Brisbane International and then reached the final of the Australian Open. She later completed the Sunshine Double by winning both Indian Wells and the Miami Open, beating top players like Elena Rybakina and Coco Gauff.She was set to play at the Stuttgart Open but pulled out due to an injury picked up in Miami. Even so, both her performance and her personal life continue to stay in the spotlight.
Article Summary: Aryna sabalenka and georgios frangulis started dating in 2024. Georgios has often been seen in her player box during big matches. While many fans enjoy seeing that support, others have raised questions about his work and time.

Article Title: Jim Rutherford sparks NHL trade rumors over Quinn Hughes' Vancouver Canucks exit raising Minnesota Wild absence concerns
Article Text:
Quinn Hughes, who recently joined the Minnesota Wild, was absent from multiple practice sessions due to his illness( Image via Imagn Images)

Jim Rutherford explains Quinn Hughes of the Vancouver Canucks NHL trade rumors

Jim Rutherford's comments about Quinn Hughes' departure have put the Vancouver Canucks back in the news, sparking a lot of NHL trade rumors. His comments made it seem like the star defenseman's departure was planned, which took the focus off the team's performance and put it on the player's intentions.Hughes not being with the Minnesota Wild before Game 1 has also made things more uncertain. When you add in the earlier rumors about the New Jersey Devils making a trade, this situation has quickly become a big story in the NHL. Jim Rutherford explains Quinn Hughes’ Vancouver Canucks exit by stating the player had already decided to leave. The Vancouver Canucks executive emphasized that Hughes’ move was not entirely tied to team struggles but rather a personal decision to eventually return to the United States.This point of view has sparked NHL trade rumors because it changes the way people talk about player movement and free agency. Rutherford said that this was like other NHL situations where players picked their favorite teams, no matter how competitive they were.These comments are important because they come at a time when the Canucks are still dealing with changes in their organization. It also makes us think about how teams keep their best players in a league where players are moving around more and more.Quinn Hughes' current situation with the Minnesota Wild has made the talks even more heated. The defenseman missed practice before Game 1, and reports say that illness was the main reason.Adding to the mystery, earlier NHL trade rumors linked Hughes to the New Jersey Devils, where there was a lot of talk about him getting back together with his brothers.Hughes' availability could have a big impact on how the Minnesota Wild set up their defense, at least from the point of view of an NHL match preview.Rutherford's comments may have made one part of Hughes' leaving clearer. But they have also led to more talk about how players can make their own choices and how teams should plan their strategies in the modern NHL, leaving front offices facing tougher challenges in retaining stars amid evolving player priorities.The situation also highlights how communication from front offices can shape public perception almost instantly, especially in today’s fast-moving digital media environment .
Article Summary: Jim rutherford's comments about quinn hughes' departure have put the vancouver canucks back in the news. His comments made it seem like the star defenseman's departure was planned, which took the focus off the team's performance and put it on the player's intentions.

Matthew Knies, a forward for the Toronto Maple Leafs, is once again at the center of NHL trade rumors. Several teams are interested in him. Recent reports say that the Chicago Blackhawks might be an unexpected team interested in signing him, even though they are in the middle of rebuilding.Toronto hasn't made any official moves yet, but the buzz around Knies suggests that he is seen as a valuable young player throughout the league. As teams figure out their offseason priorities and roster needs, things are changing quickly.People are saying that the Chicago Blackhawks might trade for Matthew Knies to make their forward lineup stronger. Sources close to the NHL say that Chicago is looking into ways to add a tough, goal-scoring winger who can help their young core.The Blackhawks are interested in this because they need to build around young players like Connor Bedard. Adding someone like Knies could have an immediate effect and be useful in the long run. Even though Chicago is rebuilding, they have looked into adding established young players in the past instead of just relying on draft picks.From Toronto's point of view, it wouldn't be easy to move Knies. The 23-year-old has made a lot of progress and is seen as a key part of the team's future.If the Maple Leafs do want to change their roster, they might want to look at offers that include high draft picks or top prospects.The most important question is still what kind of return Toronto would want. The asking price could be high because Knies is young, strong, and has a lot of potential to score. On the other hand, Chicago needs to decide if it's worth giving up valuable things to speed up the rebuilding process.This possible situation is part of a bigger trend in the NHL: teams trying to plan for the future while still being competitive right now. In the next NHL updates, pay attention to the link between Toronto and Chicago, whether or not a deal goes through, as trade talks intensify and franchises weigh short-term gains against long-term rebuilding goals.Until then, Knies remains an important piece in Toronto’s lineup and a name to watch closely in ongoing NHL trade chatter, with speculation expected to grow as offseason decisions approach rapidly.
